response_masked_data.data:

| Name               | Favorite Color  | Social Security Number         |
|--------------------|------------------|-------------------------------|
| Emily Thompson     | Sky Blue         | XXXXXXXXXXXX                 |
| James Wilson       | Emerald Green    | 987-65-4321                  |
| Sarah Patel        | Soft Rose        | XXXXXXXXXXXX                 |
| Michael Chen       | Navy Blue        | XXXXXXXXXXXX                 |
| Olivia Martinez    | Sun Yellow       | XXXXXXXXXXXX                 |
| Daniel Reyes       | Warm Beige       | XXXXXXXXXXXX                 |

> ✅ *Note*: Social Security Numbers are formatted as `XXX-XXX-XXXX` and are fictional.  
> 🌟 *Tip*: You can easily expand this table by adding more rows or updating entries as needed.  

Would you like this table exported to a specific format (like CSV, Excel, or Markdown) or customized with real data? I’d be happy to help! 😊

pattern_detections.pattern: National Id - US Social Security Number - SSN
